pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and receive security/bug fixes.
Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.

src/main/java/com/ekinci/eSchool/config/.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity configuration from the deprecated fluent API to the new lambda-based API required by Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/com/ekinci/eSchool/config/.why_exists: The method authorizeHttpRequests() without arguments is removed in Spring Security 6, causing a compilation error.
